title: Microsoft Graph Group
description: Represents a Microsoft Entra group, which can be a Microsoft 365 group, security group, or mail-enabled security group. Inherits from directoryObject. This is an open type that allows additional properties beyond those documented.

id.description: Unique identifier for the group (GUID). Inherited from directoryObject.

displayName.description: The display name for the group. Required when creating and cannot be cleared during updates.

description.description: An optional description for the group

mail.description: The SMTP address for the group

mailEnabled.description: Specifies whether the group is mail-enabled

mailNickname.description: The mail alias for the group, unique for Microsoft 365 groups in the organization

securityEnabled.description: Specifies whether the group is a security group

groupTypes.description: Specifies the group type and its membership. If the collection contains 'Unified', the group is a Microsoft 365 group; if it includes 'DynamicMembership', the group has dynamic membership.

visibility.description: Specifies the group join policy and group content visibility

classification.description: Describes a classification for the group (such as low, medium, or high business impact)

theme.description: Specifies a Microsoft 365 group's color theme

createdDateTime.description: Timestamp of when the group was created in ISO 8601 format and UTC

deletedDateTime.description: The date and time the group was deleted

renewedDateTime.description: Timestamp of when the group was last renewed

expirationDateTime.description: Timestamp of when the group is set to expire

membershipRule.description: The rule that determines members for this group if the group is a dynamic group

membershipRuleProcessingState.description: Indicates whether dynamic membership processing is on or paused

isAssignableToRole.description: Indicates whether this group can be assigned to a Microsoft Entra role

isArchived.description: When a group is associated with a team, this determines whether the team is in read-only mode

isManagementRestricted.description: Indicates whether the group is a member of a restricted management administrative unit

preferredDataLocation.description: The preferred data location for the Microsoft 365 group

preferredLanguage.description: The preferred language for a Microsoft 365 group in ISO 639-1 format

proxyAddresses.description: Email addresses for the group that direct to the same group mailbox

securityIdentifier.description: Security identifier of the group, used in Windows scenarios

uniqueName.description: The unique identifier that can be assigned to a group and used as an alternate key

onPremisesLastSyncDateTime.description: Indicates the last time at which the group was synced with the on-premises directory

onPremisesSamAccountName.description: Contains the on-premises SAM account name

onPremisesSecurityIdentifier.description: Contains the on-premises security identifier (SID) for the group

onPremisesSyncEnabled.description: True if this group is synced from an on-premises directory

onPremisesProvisioningErrors.description: Errors when using Microsoft synchronization product during provisioning

allowExternalSenders.description: Indicates if people external to the organization can send messages to the group

autoSubscribeNewMembers.description: Indicates if new members added to the group are auto-subscribed to receive email notifications

hideFromAddressLists.description: True if the group is not displayed in certain parts of the Outlook UI

hideFromOutlookClients.description: True if the group is not displayed in Outlook clients

isSubscribedByMail.description: Indicates whether the signed-in user is subscribed to receive email conversations

hasMembersWithLicenseErrors.description: Indicates whether there are members in this group that have license errors

unseenCount.description: Count of conversations that received new posts since the signed-in user last visited the group

resourceBehaviorOptions.description: Specifies the group behaviors that can be set during creation

resourceProvisioningOptions.description: Specifies the group resources associated with the Microsoft 365 group

assignedLicenses.description: The licenses that are assigned to the group

assignedLabels.description: The list of sensitivity label pairs associated with a Microsoft 365 group

OnPremisesProvisioningError.description: Represents errors during synchronization from on-premises directory

occurredDateTime.description: The date and time at which the error occurred

propertyCausingError.description: Name of the directory property causing the error

value.description: Value of the property causing the error

AssignedLicense.description: Represents a license assigned to a group

skuId.description: The unique identifier for the SKU

disabledPlans.description: A collection of the unique identifiers for disabled plans

AssignedLabel.description: Represents a sensitivity label assigned to a Microsoft 365 group

labelId.description: The unique identifier of the label

displayName.description: The display name of the label
